description: OSM-based Helensville visual scenario for Route 128 bus context under normal traffic pressure; 78 completed trips in finalized command-line SUMO run. Baseline is a comparison condition, while final dataset evidence covers 2026-05-09 to 2026-06-04.

OSM-based Helensville visual scenario for Route 128 bus context with intentionally heavier traffic pressure informed by final model-baseline evidence for 2026-05-09 to 2026-06-04: 5958 records, 42 unique trips, avg delay 8.55 min, max delay 40.57 min, and 1429 severe records; 238 completed trips in finalized command-line SUMO run.
recommended_action: Deploy standby bus or supervisor review

description: OSM-based Helensville visual scenario for Route 128 bus context with reduced road pressure, adjusted service headway, and supervisor-managed response based on the Decision Engine recommendation; 123 completed trips in finalized command-line SUMO run.
